title: Module 1
content:
Flow around a ship, ship wave system, Components of ship resistance,
Viscous resistance, Viscous pressure resistance, Form factor, Hull
roughness, Wave making resistance – pressure resistance, interference
effects, wave breaking resistance, bulbous bows and their effects.
Air and wind resistance, Resistance of appendages.

title: Module 2
content:
Dimensional analysis. Laws of comparison – geometrical, kinematical and
dynamical similarity, Newton‘s, Froude‘s and Reynold‘s law, model-ship
correlation.

title: Module 3
content:
Model testing – tank testing facilities, testing, prediction of resistance from
model tests, extrapolation, Froude‘s concept, Determination of resistance
from series test results -  Guldhammer-Harvald‘s method, statistical
prediction of resistance – Holtrop & Mennen method, effect of hull form
on resistance

title: Module 4
content:
Added resistance in waves; Resistance in restricted waterways – resistance
in shallow water, resistance in canals.
Unconventional craft and power prediction - planning crafts, multi-hull
vessels, hovercrafts/SES, hydrofoil craft
